<!-- AUTO-GENERATED BY CONCERT v0.1.0 — DO NOT EDIT. This file is managed by Concert and will be overwritten on `concert update`. -->

# Concert Workflow: Full Mission

Use this workflow for large features requiring all planning stages.

## Pipeline Stages

| Stage | Agent | Interactive | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|-------------|
| vision | concert-init | yes | Interactive interview to create VISION.md |
| requirements | concert-analyst | no | Generate REQUIREMENTS.md from accepted vision |
| architecture | concert-architect | no | Generate ARCHITECTURE.md from accepted requirements |
| ux | concert-designer | no | Generate UX.md from accepted architecture |
| tasks | concert-planner | no | Decompose approved plans into task files |
| execution | concert-continue | no | Execute task files through the code quality loop |
| verification | concert-verifier | no | Verify completed work against requirements |

## Stage Transition Rules

1. Each stage produces a draft document
2. Draft must be reviewed (`/concert:review`) and accepted (`/concert:accept`) before advancing
3. On accept: document is copied to `docs/concert/<STAGE>-SPEC.md`
4. On restart (`/concert:restart`): draft is discarded, stage re-runs from scratch
5. Pipeline advances linearly — no stage skipping in normal flow
6. `/concert:replan <stage>` marks downstream stages for re-run

## Review Cycle Rules

- Review is two-phase: user changes first, then reviewer concerns
- Review uses `concert-reviewer` agent (interactive)
- Accept uses `/concert:accept` (direct state transition — no agent)
- See CONCERT-WORKFLOW-REVIEW-CYCLE.md for detailed rules

## Execution Rules

- Execution follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-EXECUTION.md
- Code quality loop follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-CODE-QUALITY.md
